title: tmp
content_html:
tmp

we are working on site-request-studio-source-tree-reorganization.md with tasks tracked in site-request-studio-source-tree-reorganization-tasks please continue with task 9.

I’m adding one small shared bootstrap helper under scripts/ for Python path setup. That keeps the moved modules from each inventing their own parent-depth logic, while still pointing directly at the new studio/ owners.

normal development should use:

  • bin/local-studio for Studio
  • bin/public-site-preview for public Jekyll preview
  • bin/public-site-preview --livereload
